goal: ROADMAP を flywheel のメイン機能にする: 源→/flywheel:add→backlog→/next の中核ワークフローを確立し、grill が判断を必ず聞くよう事実/判断の峻別を grill・plan-steer・add の3箇所に明文化する
eval_cmd: bash -n hooks/plan-steer.sh && grep -qiE '判断' skills/grill/SKILL.md && grep -qiE '判断' hooks/plan-steer.sh && grep -qiE '判断' commands/add.md && grep -qiE 'ROADMAP' skills/guide/SKILL.md && grep -qiE 'backlog' ROADMAP.md

history.by: loop-driver: eval pass (bash -n hooks/plan-steer.sh && grep -qiE '判断' skills/grill/SKILL.md && grep -qiE '判断' hooks/plan-steer.sh && grep -qiE '判断' commands/add.md && grep -qiE 'ROADMAP' skills/guide/SKILL.md && grep -qiE 'backlog' ROADMAP.md) + monitor clean
